WELCOME_TO_FASTLANE
STATUS: ORIENTATION_READY
WHAT_THIS_GAME_IS
Jones in the Fastlane is a pressure-management game about clawing your way out of survival mode. Every cycle you move through the city, spend limited hours, protect your sanity, and decide whether to chase stability, gamble on hustles, or invest in the long climb upward. Burn Rate is the weekly bill you must cover just to stay operational. Debt grows when you miss it. Ambient Stress is the background sanity drain that hits every cycle before your rest recovery. The run gets tighter if you ignore those systems or spend all your time reacting. The run opens up when you land better work, build education, and turn desperate short-term choices into sustainable momentum. The point is to survive the squeeze long enough to become dangerous.
CORE LOOP

Travel, choose actions, manage credits and sanity, then...

text: I have enough evidence to write the authoritative slice: Week 1 is complete, the checkpoint export succeeded, and the only notable operational wrinkle is the still-unreliable direct `Apply` button click under `agent-browser`. I’m updating the control surface and the compact audit docs now, then I’ll do one last consistency check on the edited files.

Completed one bounded Phase 11 slice for Persona A from fresh onboarding through the authoritative Week 1 close.

Week 1 closed on the live summary screen at `₡4 / Debt ₡0 / Hunger 20% / Sanity 50%`. The path was: decline `Shady Fixer Courier Job`, secure `Sanitation-T3`, work one 6CH shift for `₡84`, return home, end turn, and absorb `₡80` burn rate. I exported the durable checkpoint to [week-01-save.json](/home/silwerdivan/code/jones-vibes/docs/workflows/cyberpunk-overhaul/checkpoints/persona_a/week-01-save.json) with metadata in [week-01-meta.json](/home/silwerdivan/code/jones-vibes/docs/workflows/cyberpunk-overhaul/checkpoints/persona_a/week-01-meta.json), and captured the summary screenshot at [week-01-summary.png](/home/silwerdivan/code/jones-vibes/docs/workflows/cyberpunk-overhaul/checkpoints/persona_a/week-01-summary.png).

I updated the canonical slice log at [week-01.md](/home/silwerdivan/code/jones-vibes/docs/workflows/cyberpunk-overhaul/phase-11-slices/persona-a/week-01....
